store_pack_observe.store: raw evidence remains in refs/artifacts; canvas does not become canonical memory
store_pack_observe.pack: Mermaid canvas and node index are compact candidates for bounded context injection
store_pack_observe.observe: node_id + refs provide drill-down receipts for debugging and rollback

mermaid:
graph LR
    upstream_scan["Scan TencentDB-Agent-Memory\\n[done]\\nrefs:1"]
    value_selection["Select symbolic canvas absorption slice\\n[done]\\nrefs:1"]
    implementation["Implement symbolic-canvas helper\\n[done]\\nrefs:2"]
    verification["Run focused tests and CLI smoke\\n[done]\\nrefs:1"]
    upstream_scan -- "filter" --> value_selection
    value_selection -- "build" --> implementation
    implementation -- "prove" --> verification
    classDef done fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a
    class upstream_scan done
    class value_selection done
    class implementation done
    class verification done

nodes.label: Run focused tests and CLI smoke
